inline_comments.message:
why we have same task here and same in nexus role ? 
https://gerrit.onap.org/r/gitweb?p=oom/offline-installer.git;a=blob;f=ansible/roles/nexus/tasks/install.yml;h=99d73dce57fcec0e3723de98128c9cbd63386597;hb=refs/heads/master#l16

links does not work well here...

Why not? This was needed to be added because the order of roles execution was changed, it's now nginx first then nexus.
There is no need to remove this same step from nexus role. And it makes possible to test both roles independently.
